title: Use the central configuration lifecycle
description: Rule for package and host startup code that uses DMBServerHelper configuration primitives.
contextText:
Use GenericConfiguration<T> and package-level configuration classes for DMB package startup.
Load ServerHelperConfiguration before package configuration that depends on server defaults, secrets, localization, URL composition, cookies, or sessions.
Keep configuration loading deterministic and document when new behavior runs: before file loading, during file loading, after file loading, or during application middleware registration.
